If this is a corrective update, change component ZZ and adjust the version number. Major enhancement: Examples of major release changes would include changes to: Indications for Use and/or Contraindications; changes in computing platform (e.g. Windows to IOS); major new clinical functionalities or major performance enhancement of medical data handling; changes in security changes in software safety class (A, B, C) or in mandatory standards or in safety hazards or innovative workflow altering user habits Minor enhancement: Examples of minor release changes would include additional enhancements that do not affect security, safety or efficacy. Corrective update: Examples of maintenance release changes would include immediate fixes (hot fixes). 2.7.2 Revision History Build#DateSignificant Differences from Previous Version
